name: Corn Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the frozen corn, minced red onion, chopped red bell pepper, honey, cider vinegar, dry mustard, dill seed (if using), salt, and pepper.
2. Stir until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
3. Pack the mixture into one or two glass jars with lids.
4. Allow to sit at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving, or up to 2 days ahead of time.
